work.description: Architected the UI/UX modernization for a stealth-mode AI startup, implementing a robust component system from scratch based on a complex design system. Revamped the entire platform's interface to ensure a highly professional and visually striking user experience, driving user retention and product readiness.

Spearheaded the engineering of mission-critical revenue recovery tools, successfully identifying hundreds of millions of BRL in untapped revenue by detecting complex usage leaks across a massive enterprise ecosystem. Architected a high-performance sales platform optimized for up-selling and cross-team productivity.

Orchestrated premium digital experiences and IoT hardware-software prototypes for global brands like Spotify, Sonos, and Samsung. Engineered real-time state synchronization for physical IoT devices and led legacy migrations to React and Svelte to improve Core Web Vitals.

Architected a scalable, token-based design system and UI library that enabled the rapid creation and consistent branding of multiple frontends. Implemented a micro-frontends architecture to streamline the deployment of new features across Brazil’s sales price comparison platform, drastically reducing infrastructure overhead and accelerating time-to-market.

Delivered complex, multi-language e-commerce solutions (VTEX/Shopify) for international markets. Built custom serverless integrations using TypeScript and AWS to develop unique and customized storefronts, extending platform capabilities to perfectly reflect each brand's unique identity and specific business requirements.

Spearheaded technical discovery and benchmarking for strategic internal initiatives, defining long-term technological roadmaps. Architected comprehensive feasibility studies and risk assessments to ensure infrastructure scalability.

Rapid Progression: Promoted from Frontend Developer to Tech Lead within 12 months. Directed a 6-person development team in building a microservices-based SaaS for social data analytics, processing over 2 Terabytes of data per week. Managed cloud infrastructure on AWS and utilized Elasticsearch for complex querying, ensuring 99.9% availability for a growing user base.

work.company: TJRN - Tribunal de Justiça do Rio Grande do Norte
work.description: Developed and maintained internal tools for the judicial system, improving efficiency and accessibility for judges and staff.

Spearheaded rapid prototyping and delivery of innovative research applications for master’s students. Mentored graduate students in web development (React, Node.js), enabling the successful deployment of mission-critical projects.

education.institution: Universidade Federal do Rio Grande do Norte (UFRN)
education.degree: Bachelor of Science in Computer Engineering
